title: T4015 T5 Guide - Return of Investment Income 2025 - Canada.ca
content:
## T4015 T5 Guide - Return of Investment Income 2025
Information for filers who are required to complete the T5 information return for certain investments income paid to a resident of Canada, or for certain investments income paid to a nominee or agent for a person resident in Canada.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format t4015-e.html PDF t4015-25e.pdf Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: N/A – Standard print PDF (t4015-e.pdf) 2024 – Standard print PDF (t4015-24e.pdf) 2023 – Standard print PDF (t4015-23e.pdf) 2022 – Standard print PDF (t4015-22e.pdf) 2021 – Standard print PDF (t4015-21e.pdf) 2020 – Standard print PDF (t4015-20e.pdf) 2019 – Standard print PDF (t4015-19e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (t4015-18e.pdf) 2017 – Standard print PDF (t4015-17e.pdf) 2016 – Standard print PDF (t4015-16e.pdf) 2015 – Standard print PDF (t4015-15e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (t4015-14e.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (t4015-13e.pdf) 2012 – Standard print PDF (t4015-12e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (t4015-11e.pdf) 2010 – Standard print PDF (t4015-10e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (t4015-09e.pdf) 2008 – Standard print PDF (t4015-08e.pdf) 2007 – Standard print PDF (t4015-07e.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (t4015-06e.pdf) 2005 – Standard print PDF (t4015-05e.pdf) 2004 – Standard print PDF (t4015-04e.pdf) 2002 – Standard print PDF (t4015-02e.pdf) 2001 – Standard print PDF (t4015-01e.pdf) 2000 – Standard print PDF (t4015-00e.pdf) 1999 – Standard print PDF (t4015-99e.pdf) 1998 – Standard print PDF (t4015-98e.pdf) 1997 – Standard print PDF (t4015-97e.pdf) 1996 – Standard print PDF (t4015-96e.pdf) 1995 – Standard print PDF (t4015-95e.pdf) 1994 – Standard print PDF (t4015-94e.pdf) 1993 – Standard print PDF (t4015-93e.pdf) 1992 – Standard print PDF (t4015-92e.pdf) 1991 – Standard print PDF (t4015-91e.pdf) 1990 – Standard print PDF (t4015-90e.pdf) 1989 – Standard print PDF (t4015-89e.pdf) 1988 – Standard print PDF (t4015-88e.pdf)

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- T5 Statement of Investment Income (slip)
- T5SUM Return of Investment Income
